film.title: Fun in Acapulco
film.overview: Mike Windgren works on a boat in Acapulco, but when the bratty daughter of the boat owner gets him fired, Mike finds new work as a lifeguard and singer at a local hotel. Tensions increase when Mike runs into the rival lifeguard—who is also the champion diver of Mexico.

dialogues.dialogue: And he ordered the drinks, too.  It is Coke, isn't it, Daddy?  You ought to be ashamed  bringing my daughter here, ordering liquor.  But I didn't bring her here.
dialogues.cause_raw: bringing a minor to a place where alcohol is served
